## 📌 Description

Provide a clear and concise summary of the changes introduced in this Pull Request. Explain *what* problem is being solved and *why* this approach was taken.

---

## 🛠️ Type of Change

Please check the options that are relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 🤖 AI / LangGraph / RAG enhancement
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition / modification
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring / Code quality cleanup
- [ ] 🚨 Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to fail)

---

## 🔗 Related Issue

Closes #[Issue Number] (e.g., Closes #42)

## 🧪 Testing Strategy & Verification

Describe the tests conducted to verify changes:

1. **Automated Verification**:
   - [ ] Passed `npm run typecheck`
   - [ ] Passed `npm run lint`
   - [ ] Passed unit/integration tests (`npm run test`)
2. **Manual Verification**:
   - Tested in browser (Chrome / Safari / Firefox)
   - Tested local Docker container build (`npm run docker:build`)
   - Verified state handling across Clerk Auth & DB sync

## ✅ Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have added appropriate comments to complex code blocks.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`docs/`, README, folder READMEs).
- [ ] My changes generate zero new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have verified backwards compatibility.
